response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment of "Chronic" (Anya Melfissa's original song) which spans from the start to about 2:22. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics of "Chronic" by Anya Melfissa. 3. Extracted the lyrics from the search results, ensuring the original Japanese and English translation are included. 4. Added a second scene for the post-performance talk segment. 5. Adjusted timestamps to be chronologically consistent.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Anya Melfissa's 3D birthday live performance, where she sings and dances to her original song "Chronic" followed by a talk segment.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa performs her original song "Chronic" on stage, accompanied by dancing. The song is in Japanese.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
I'll never break down.
Everlasting knife.

例えば 君が
私の意志を制御しようとも
無味平然に
望み澄ました 否定を投げる

時代の最中に
過去の遺物が
寄る辺なく生まれ

異質な孤独に苛まれても

擦り切れるまで
零れた温度に
浸されて 折り紙付きの
心が咲く

張り詰めた
収まらない声を聞け
私が真の刃と
ただ刻んで裂いて切って
唱えた道を指し示す
指図もなく 愛想もなく
I'll never break down.
Everlasting knife.

例えば 君が
私の意義を問い掛けるのなら
極不自然に
乾き晒した境地を見せる

神秘の情火は 夜の帳を
下ろさず に叫び

理想の起源が波を立てても

貫くだけと

今 私は 鉄の覚悟を
ただ鍛えて焼いて打って
無粋な弱さを消す

微塵もなく
揺るぎもなく
形を宿した自我に
気の迷いも 酸いも断って
描いた姿のまま
行きたいだけ
固く誓う

私が真の刃と
ただ刻んで裂いて切って
唱えた道を指し示す
指図もなく 愛想もなく
I'll never break down.
Everlasting knife.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'll never break down.
Everlasting knife.

Even if you try to control my will,
I'll show you an indifferent,
clear denial.

Amidst the era,
a relic of the past is born, helpless,
and even if I am tormented by strange loneliness,

I will soak in the temperature that spilled out
until I am worn out,
and my origami-proven heart blooms.

Listen to the packed, unstoppable voice.
I will carve, tear, and cut as a true blade,
and point to the path I sang of.
Without instructions, without friendliness,
I'll never break down.
Everlasting knife.

Even if you question my significance,
I will show you an extremely unnatural,
dried-out state of mind.

The mysterious passion of the heart,
without bringing down the curtain on the night,
shouts.
Even if the origin of the ideal causes waves,

I will only pierce through.
Now, I will forge, burn, and strike my iron determination,
and erase the unrefined weakness.
Without a speck of doubt,
without wavering,
I will walk as I want in the self that harbors form,
cutting off doubt and bitterness.

I will carve, tear, and cut as a true blade,
and point to the path I sang of.
Without instructions, without friendliness,
I'll never break down.
Everlasting knife.

scenes.description: The performance ends, and Anya Melfissa begins a talk segment.
